title: 8 Upcoming Dividend Increases To Start 2023
text: All stocks have at least five fiscal years of dividend growth history and come from the U.S. Dividend Champions List. They have an average increase of 13% and a median increase of 7.6%.

title: Erie Indemnity (ERIE) OK's Dividend Hike to Share More Profits
text: Erie Indemnity's (ERIE) recent dividend hike reflects its solid capital position and balance sheet strength that continue to support effective capital deployment.
